Class TreeNode<T>

java.lang.Object
TreeNode<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of data stored within a node
public class TreeNode<T> extends Object
Simple objects that represents a node in a tree

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TreeNode(T dataNode)
    Create a new TreeNode with left and right child set to null and data set to the dataNode
    TreeNode(TreeNode<T> node)
    used for making deep copies
